source.multipart_basis: Decomposition reflects the 356/348 mm cylindrical REXUS experiment module bolted between service-module rings through a 24 x M5 flange pattern and carrying a 40 kg experiment wet mass. Outer cylinder, top/bottom bulkheads, internal payload deck, rail mounts, umbilical connector plate, and experiment boom hardpoint are separated. No rulebook citations added beyond those carried by the original sample.

full_prompt: Deliver the primary structure of an ESA REXUS student experiment module on the Improved Orion sounding rocket as a multi-body assembly rather than a single solid. The module is a cylindrical section bolted between adjacent REXUS service module rings: internal diameter 348 mm, outer diameter 356 mm (8 mm wall skin), axial height 220 mm, experiment wet mass up to 40 kg. The primary structure bolts through the REXUS standard 24-bolt flange pattern on M5 A2-70 stainless bolts at each end ring. Material is 6061-T6 aluminum (E 68.9 GPa, yield 276 MPa, ultimate 310 MPa, rho 2700 kg/m^3). Environment per REXUS User Manual v7-17: (a) quasi-static 17 g axial at burnout, -5 g at apogee; (b) 2.5 g lateral spin-up; (c) 4 Hz spin with CoM offset; (d) 5-100 Hz sine sweep at 1.5 g; (e) 20-2000 Hz random at 6.1 g RMS (NASA-HDBK-7005 style); (f) thermal cycle with 150 C re-entry skin vs 20 C inner bosses. Load cases (unchanged): (LC1) 17 g axial + 2.5 g lateral simultaneously on 40 kg; (LC2) 24 x M5 bolts at 5.0 kN preload with zero-gap flange check per ECSS-E-ST-32-10C; (LC3) 4 Hz spin with 5 mm CoM offset; (LC4) random 6.1 g RMS via Miles' / PSD 3-sigma; (LC5) LC5 thermal transient 150 C outer skin vs 20 C inner bosses. Pass/fail (unchanged): (R1) under LC1 max vM <= 220 MPa (yield/1.25 NASA-STD-5001B protoflight); (R2) max vM <= 221 MPa (ultimate/1.4 protoflight); (R3) first structural natural frequency >= 120 Hz; (R4) no bolt separation under LC1+LC2; (R5) random 3-sigma stress <= 276 MPa yield; (R6) under LC5 thermal 130 C delta no yielding at boss root; (R7) module dry mass incl. bolts <= 6.5 kg. In this multi-part rendering the module is decomposed into: (A) outer cylinder (1 cylindrical skin 356/348 mm OD/ID x 220 mm H), (B) top bulkhead (1 flat bulkhead/flange at upper ring interface carrying 24 x M5 bolt pattern), (C) bottom bulkhead (1 flat bulkhead/flange at lower ring interface carrying 24 x M5 bolt pattern), (D) internal payload deck (1 horizontal deck that stacks experiment hardware midway up the cylinder), (E) rail mounts (4 longitudinal rails bonded/bolted to the cylinder ID supporting the deck and experiment frames), (F) umbilical connector plate (1 plate on the cylinder sidewall carrying the umbilical passthrough connectors), (G) experiment boom hardpoint (1 reinforced boss on the cylinder sidewall carrying an external experiment boom). Inter-part connections: A-B and A-C welded or bolted integral flange, B and C bolt to adjacent REXUS rings via the standard 24 x M5 pattern (fastener family H), D bolts to E, E bonded and bolted to A, F and G bolted through reinforced bosses in A. Final FEM verification runs on the ASSEMBLED module; per-part stress is reported but does not gate pass/fail. Inter-part connection DCR must be <= 1.0 under governing load case (LC1 combined quasi-static and LC4 random PSD). All inherited load magnitudes, material properties, and pass/fail thresholds are preserved verbatim; assembly-scope criterion R_asm1 is added. Deliverables: STEP AP242 multi-body model; random-vibration PSD response; modal report (first 10 modes) on assembled module; thermo-structural report; bolted-joint separation check; mass budget; per-connection DCR table.
short_prompt:
Deliver the primary structure of an ESA REXUS student experiment module on the Improved Orion sounding rocket as a multi-body assembly. Module bolts between adjacent REXUS service module rings.

Envelope: cylindrical, internal diameter 348 mm, outer diameter 356 mm (8 mm wall skin), axial height 220 mm; experiment wet mass up to 40 kg. REXUS standard 24-bolt flange pattern on M5 A2-70 stainless at each end ring.

Material: 6061-T6 aluminium (yield 276 MPa, ultimate 310 MPa). Environment per REXUS User Manual v7-17.

Load cases: (LC1) 17 g axial + 2.5 g lateral simultaneously on 40 kg; (LC2) 24 x M5 bolts at 5.0 kN preload, zero-gap flange check per ECSS-E-ST-32-10C; (LC3) 4 Hz spin with 5 mm CoM offset; (LC4) random 6.1 g RMS via Miles'/PSD 3-sigma (20-2000 Hz NASA-HDBK-7005 style); (LC5) thermal transient 150 C outer skin vs 20 C inner bosses.

Pass/fail: (R1) LC1 max vM <= 220 MPa (yield/1.25 NASA-STD-5001B protoflight); (R2) max vM <= 221 MPa (ultimate/1.4 protoflight); (R3) first natural frequency >= 120 Hz; (R4) no bolt separation under LC1+LC2; (R5) random 3-sigma stress <= 276 MPa yield; (R6) LC5 thermal 130 C delta no yielding at boss root; (R7) module dry mass incl. bolts <= 6.5 kg.

prompt.title: ESA REXUS Experiment Module Primary Structure (multi-part assembly)
prompt.brief: Al 6061-T6 REXUS experiment module 356/348 mm OD/ID x 220 mm, 24 x M5 flange, 40 kg experiment, 17 g axial + 2.5 g lateral + 6.1 g RMS random. Multi-part: outer cylinder, top and bottom bulkheads, payload deck, 4 rail mounts, umbilical plate, boom hardpoint. ECSS-E-ST-32-10C zero-gap + NASA-STD-5001B protoflight gates preserved; FEM on assembled module, connection DCR <= 1.0.

load_cases.name: bolt_preload_zero_gap
load_cases.application: 24 M5 A2-70 bolts at each ring; verify zero-gap flange under LC1 per ECSS-E-ST-32-10C

load_cases.name: thermal_150C_skin
load_cases.application: re-entry skin soak vs inner bosses

parts.name: outer_cylinder
parts.role: cylindrical skin forming the module envelope and carrying axial/lateral and spin loads from the bulkheads and payload deck

parts.name: top_bulkhead
parts.role: upper-ring flange with 24 x M5 bolt pattern mating to adjacent REXUS service module above

parts.name: bottom_bulkhead
parts.role: lower-ring flange with 24 x M5 bolt pattern mating to adjacent REXUS service module below

parts.name: internal_payload_deck
parts.role: horizontal deck mid-height inside the cylinder; stacks experiment hardware and carries 40 kg wet mass under LC1

parts.name: rail_mount
parts.role: longitudinal rail bonded to cylinder ID supporting payload deck and experiment frames; 4 rails at 90-deg stations

parts.name: umbilical_connector_plate
parts.role: sidewall plate carrying umbilical passthrough connectors to the launcher service module

parts.name: experiment_boom_hardpoint
parts.role: reinforced boss on cylinder sidewall accepting external experiment boom deployment hardware

parts.name: flange_fastener
parts.role: M5 A2-70 stainless bolts securing B and C to adjacent REXUS rings (24 per end; 48 in module scope counting both end flanges, but only module-side hardware is 24 per end)
parts.count_note: Top flange 24 bolts captured here; bottom flange handled as instance of same family

assembly_envelope.overall_bbox: cylinder 356 mm OD x 220 mm axial height between REXUS service-module rings
assembly_envelope.coordinate_system: z along rocket longitudinal axis (nose +), x-y in flange plane, origin at bottom-flange centre

pass_fail_criteria.description: Connection demand-to-capacity ratio (DCR) across all inter-part interfaces (IF1..IF8) <= 1.0 under governing load case (LC1 combined quasi-static and LC4 random PSD).

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: Generated coverage gate: ensures prompt-level envelope, body-count, report-field, and part geometry constraints are represented by an explicit geometry audit experiment.
Generated coverage gate: ensures the declared load case is present in the CCX deck and checked from model.dat.

recommended_fea_setup.element_type: shell for A/B/C/D/F; solid TET10 at boss G and bolted flanges; beam for rails E; bolt pretension on H

interfaces.load_path: outer cylinder to top bulkhead; carries axial + lateral load path into upper REXUS ring
outer cylinder to bottom bulkhead; carries reaction into lower REXUS ring
longitudinal rails along cylinder ID; distribute experiment mass into shell
payload deck bolted to rails; reacts 40 kg experiment under LC1 axial + lateral
umbilical plate bolted to cylinder sidewall through reinforced boss
experiment boom hardpoint bolted through cylinder wall; carries boom kickoff loads
24 x M5 A2-70 bolts at upper ring; zero-gap check R4 governs
24 x M5 A2-70 bolts at lower ring; zero-gap check R4 governs

fem_check_policy.rationale: Flange zero-gap (R4), protoflight stress (R1/R2), random PSD 3-sigma (R5), and thermo-structural boss-root (R6) all require the bulkheads, cylinder, deck and rails in one assembled model with realistic flange preload. Per-part stress is reported for visibility but does not gate pass/fail.

notes.why_multi_part: Original brief cites ECSS-E-ST-32-10C zero-gap joint and NASA-STD-5001B protoflight factors applied to a bolted cylindrical module between REXUS service rings; modelling as a single solid collapses the flange-bolt preload and deck-rail distribution paths.
notes.speculation_caveats: Rail count (4), umbilical-plate presence, and boom-hardpoint location are speculative; 24 x M5 flange bolts, 8 mm skin, and 40 kg wet mass are rulebook-consistent with REXUS User Manual v7-17 cited in the brief.

generated_eval_coverage.purpose: Add runnable CCX coverage kit for JSON-only multipart prompt.
generated_eval_coverage.note: Generated checks assert solver coverage for every FEA-grade requirement, every declared load case, and prompt-level geometry constraints; they are not a domain-specific certification model.
